title: Foamy closeout correction: index now clear
body: Follow-up correction from final live-state pass: my previous closeout note preserved the earlier peer-staged rename state, but git diff --cached --name-status is now empty. Active claims and active commit queue are also empty after Foamy claim closure. Working tree still contains the WS1 implementation plus peer/shared collaboration-state and plan updates, so I still did not stage or commit.
